metadata.name: Manage Road Closures for a Marathon

description: An operator must implement and manage all road closures for the annual city marathon.

nodes.task_description: Load the official marathon route and closure schedule into the traffic management system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully inputs the event plan.

nodes.task_description: On race day, automatically update the status of all affected roads to 'Closed' in public navigation systems.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the road statuses.

nodes.task_description: As the race progresses, reopen roads behind the last runner based on their real-time location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent dynamically reopens roads, minimizing disruption.
